  • Uses of State in ubc.team09.eval

    Methods in ubc.team09.eval with parameters of type State
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    HeuristicMethod.evaluate(State state)
    Returns a number in the range of (-∞, +∞) where lower values indicate a more favorable position for Black, and greater values indicate a more favorable position for White.
    double
    KMinDist.evaluate(State state)
     
    double
    QMinDist.evaluate(State state)
     
    double
    X.evaluate(State state)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    State
    State.copy()
    Returns a copy of this state.
    State
    StateGenerator.next()
    Yields the next child state.
    Methods in ubc.team09.state with parameters of type State
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    BoardState.isConsistentWith(State state)
    Returns true if and only if the given state has the same occupancy board and queen positions as this object.
    static boolean
    Move.isLegal(State board, int move)
    Returns true if and only if a move is legal from a given board state.
    Constructors in ubc.team09.state with parameters of type State
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    State(State prev, int move)
    Creates a new board state by applying a move to an existing one.
     
    StateGenerator(State parent)
    Creates a new generator to iterate over the children of a given game state.
